description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 7, 2025 at 9:33 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving a fallen utility line on Angus Street near Lakewood Avenue N.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling east on Angus Street when the front of the Waymo AV made contact with a fallen utility line hanging in the 
travel lane. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver was present in the 
driver’s seating position. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
